mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT i.* FROM course_record cr INNER JOIN course c ON cr.course_id = c.id INNER JOIN institution i ON c.institution_id = i.id WHERE cr.student_id = #{studentId} AND cr.is_delete = 0

SELECT DISTINCT i.* FROM user_platform up INNER JOIN `user` u ON up.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN institution i ON u.institution_id = i.id -- 联查机构主表获取机构详情 WHERE up.platform = #{platform} AND up.open_id = #{openId} AND up.is_available = 1 -- 过滤掉已经被禁用的微信绑定关系
